ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor mode */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor mode */,
  "gyro_status" TEXT /* Status of the gyroscope (On, Off, Drive On) */,
  "accel_status" TEXT /* Status of the accelerometer (On, Off, Duty-Cycled) */,
  "magnetometer_status" TEXT /* Status of the magnetometer (On, Off) */,
  "dmp_status" TEXT /* Status of the Digital Motion Processor (On, Off, On or Off) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor mode */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mode was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mode was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the sensor mode */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the mode */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the mode */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the mode is a default configuration */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments for the mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_modes_dmp_status FOREIGN KEY ("dmp_status") REFERENCES dmp_status ("status_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_modes_accel_status FOREIGN KEY ("accel_status") REFERENCES accel_status ("status_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_modes_magnetometer_status FOREIGN KEY ("magnetometer_status") REFERENCES magnetometer_status ("status_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_modes_gyro_status FOREIGN KEY ("gyro_status") REFERENCES gyro_status ("status_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the device */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device was last updated */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the device */,
  "last_seen" TEXT /* Last time the device was active or checked */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the device (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_modes" (
  "device_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device mode assignment */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor mode */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mode was assigned to the device */,
  "unassigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mode was unassigned from the device (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (active, inactive) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the sensor mode assigned to the device */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments for the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_modes_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_modes_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("mode_id") REFERENCES sensor_modes ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gyro_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gyroscope status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the gyroscope status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gyroscope status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accel_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accelerometer status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the accelerometer status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the accelerometer status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "magnetometer_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each magnetometer status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the magnetometer status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the magnetometer status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dmp_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DMP status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the DMP status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the DMP status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, developer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact purposes */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mode_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor mode */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action (e.g., specific changes made) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mode_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mode_logs_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("mode_id") REFERENCES sensor_modes ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action (e.g., specific changes made) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_mode_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "device_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device mode assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., assign, unassign, update) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action (e.g., specific changes made) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_mode_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_mode_logs_device_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_mode_id") REFERENCES device_modes ("device_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the device group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the group was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_group_members" (
  "group_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group membership */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device group */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device was assigned to the group */,
  "unassigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device was unassigned from the group (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the membership (active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_group_members_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES device_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_group_members_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_mode_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor mode */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., gyroscope, accelerometer, magnetometer, DMP) */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_mode_settings_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("mode_id") REFERENCES sensor_modes ("mode_id")
)
